heroSubtitleForm: Enroll + liveness check + deduplication search in one call.
heroSubtitleResult: Person has been enrolled with liveness and search checks.
heroSubtitleConflict: This face matches an existing person. Review the images you used and choose a next step.
chooseOneDescription: Scan with your camera or upload a photo. Each capture is added to the enrolled face images.
cameraSubtitle: Open the camera and capture one face image
uploadSubtitle: Select one or more image files from your device
apiRefSummary: API reference: Create Person with Liveness
apiRefBody: Base URL https://api.verifik.co. Send JSON with profile fields, a single collection_id (collection _id), liveness and search thresholds, and at least one base64 face image per entry in images (no data URL prefix).
apiRefEndpointDesc: Runs liveness on the submitted face(s), searches for similar enrollments, then creates or updates a person in the target collection.
paramImagesDesc: Array of base64 face images (raw base64, not data URLs)
bullet1: This demo uses createPersonWithLiveness from @humanauthn/api-client with your session token.
bullet2: Responses may include a signature block alongside data depending on environment.
